title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 19 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 19 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 19 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/10/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, main contract closed707. The spot quotation in the morning quoted varied. Some steelprocurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy；but some traders quotation is still stronger, The overall deal atmosphere was general today。PBF at Shandong port dealt 865 yuan/mt, increased 15-25 yuan/mt over yesterday; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 870-890 yuan/ton, prices are mixed today over yesterday.According to data tracked by SMM, 82 ships arrived at domestic main ports from October 11-17.
